headline: GE Vernova Earnings Due. This Will Matter Far More Than Gas Turbine Orders.
summary: Highly anticipated GE Vernova earnings for the second quarter early Wednesday will provide the latest insights into AI-driven demand for gas turbines and electrical transformers.  GE Vernova confirmed in June that its massive, heavy-duty gas turbines are basically sold out through 2029.  Big Tech companies aggressively purchased the gas turbines to power their artificial-intelligence (AI) data-center campuses by themselves, with regionals grids unable to meet massive electricity demand.

headline: How to Use GE Vernova Earnings to Tell if the AI Trade Is Dead
summary: Demand for  GE Vernova’s  power generation equipment amid the AI data center building boom has sent shares to levels no one expected.  Now, how the stock reacts to earnings on Wednesday can help tell investors if the AI trade is alive and well, or if more pain is coming to many stocks, beyond shares of Vernova.  It’s an important report for Vernova, with shares above $1,000, up roughly 700% since the company was spun out of  GE Aerospace  in 2024.

headline: GE Vernova (GEV) Stock Could Trade At A Premium After $11b Grid Investment
summary: GE Vernova has delivered a powerful 91.1% return over the past year, yet the valuation checks are pulling in different directions, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) estimate pointing to a premium to intrinsic value while market based multiples suggest the stock may still be priced reasonably against peers. Over the past 12 months, GE Vernova's 91.1% gain puts recent buyers in solid profit, which raises the bar for what the current share price implies about future cash flows. On the one...
